differential_diagnoses: Drug reaction with eosinophilia and systemic symptoms (DRESS) syndrome
next_steps: Excisional biopsy of a representative lymph node with immunophenotyping and TCR gene rearrangement studies
Flow cytometry of peripheral blood to look for Sézary cells
T-cell receptor gene rearrangement studies on skin biopsy specimens
PET/CT scan to guide biopsy targets and assess disease burden
Repeat skin biopsy with immunohistochemistry (CD3, CD4, CD8, CD30, CD20, PD-1)
